SESSION_SECRET.description: Random signing key for cookies. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

STORAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: AES-256 key for user blobs in R2 (64-char hex). **Must match** the key used when migrating `webui_data/`.

BASE_API_URL.description: MyXL API base URL — see [Telegram channel](https://t.me/alyxcli) or maintainer.

BASE_CIAM_URL.description: MyXL CIAM endpoint (from project env bundle).

BASIC_AUTH.description: HTTP Basic auth header value for API requests.

UA.description: User-Agent string required by the API.

AX_FP.description: Default device fingerprint (32-char hex) — per-user overrides live in R2.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional — BotFather token for Telegram webhook mode.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth Client ID for Sign in with Google.

scripts.deploy:staging: npm run db:migrations:apply:staging && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run db:migrations:apply:production && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:migrations:apply:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrations:apply:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
